subcodes.title: Prayer for 19 letters
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I and all things bear witness unto Thee that Thou art God, there is no God but Thee. From time immemorial, O my God, Thou hast been, and unto everlasting Thou shalt be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله العزیز الرؤف. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاشهدنک و کل شیء بانک انت الله لا اله الا انت لم تزل یا الهی کنت کائنا و لا تزال تکون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @petitions to authorities, @transcendence; unknowability of God
